examples.title: Empty state
examples.description: An area chart with reserved layout and no available data.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { AreaChart } from '@lostgradient/cinder/area-chart';
</script>

<AreaChart label="No retention data" series={[]} dataTableVisibility="hidden" />

examples.title: Usage area
examples.description: A single-series area chart for product usage.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { AreaChart } from '@lostgradient/cinder/area-chart';

  const series = [
    {
      id: 'usage',
      label: 'Usage',
      data: [
        { x: 'Jan', y: 44 },
        { x: 'Feb', y: 61 },
        { x: 'Mar', y: 79 },
      ],
    },
  ];
</script>

<AreaChart label="Product usage" {series} />

examples.title: Stacked retention
examples.description: A stacked area chart comparing retained accounts by cohort.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { AreaChart } from '@lostgradient/cinder/area-chart';

  const series = [
    {
      id: 'self-serve',
      label: 'Self-serve',
      data: [
        { x: 'Month 1', y: 28 },
        { x: 'Month 2', y: 34 },
        { x: 'Month 3', y: 39 },
      ],
    },
    {
      id: 'sales-led',
      label: 'Sales-led',
      data: [
        { x: 'Month 1', y: 18 },
        { x: 'Month 2', y: 24 },
        { x: 'Month 3', y: 31 },
      ],
    },
  ];
</script>

<AreaChart label="Retained accounts" {series} mode="stacked" />
